description_long: This is a large, ornate book with a hard cover featuring a deep blue background adorned with intricate gold floral and vine patterns along the borders. The cover design is symmetrical and highly decorative, giving the book an antique or luxurious appearance. The edges of the pages are visible and appear to be slightly yellowed, suggesting age or high-quality paper. The spine and edges are bordered with a reddish-brown trim, adding to the book's elegant look. The book is thick and substantial, likely containing many pages. No visible text or imagery is present on the cover aside from the decorative motifs.
description: A large, ornate book with a blue and gold decorative hard cover and reddish-brown trim, exuding an antique or luxurious feel.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showcasing the blue and gold decorative cover with a reddish-brown border and a glimpse of the page edges.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top edge, highlighting the intricate gold border on the blue cover and the layered, slightly yellowed pages.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the full expanse of the blue and gold cover, with the reddish-brown trim and visible page edges.
description_view_3: The bottom edge view emphasizes the thickness of the book, the ornate gold border, and the stacked pages.
attribute_cover_illustration: No illustration visible. The cover is decorated with ornate gold floral and vine patterns on a blue background, but there is no pictorial artwork.
